claim_title: example_usage.py and version.py are orphaned from imports

results.description: Verify files exist and no external import references are found.
results.command: test -f cohort_projections/data/process/example_usage.py; test -f cohort_projections/version.py; example_refs=$(rg -n "example_usage" cohort_projections scripts tests -g "*.py" | rg -v "example_usage.py" | wc -l || true); version_refs=$(rg -n "cohort_projections\.version|from \.+version import|import version" cohort_projections scripts tests -g "*.py" -g "!cohort_projections/version.py" | wc -l || true); echo "EXAMPLE_USAGE_EXTERNAL_REFS=$example_refs"; echo "VERSION_PY_EXTERNAL_REFS=$version_refs"; if [ "$example_refs" -eq 0 ] && [ "$version_refs" -eq 0 ]; then echo "ASSERTION=PASS"; else echo "ASSERTION=FAIL"; exit 1; fi
failure_reasons: stdout does not match regex: EXAMPLE_USAGE_EXTERNAL_REFS=0
stdout does not match regex: VERSION_PY_EXTERNAL_REFS=0
